ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sunspot_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the observation */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the observation */,
  "sunspot_number" REAL /* Sunspot number observed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sunspot observation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sunspot observation */,
  "magnetic_field_strength" REAL /* Magnetic field strength at the observation point */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., ground-based, satellite) */,
  "observation_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the observation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sunspot_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the data source */,
  "instruments_used" TEXT /* List of instruments used for data collection */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format_version" TEXT /* Version of the file format */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data within the file (e.g., structured, unstructured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" TEXT /* Name of the annotator */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., note, warning, error) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sunspot_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sunspot_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "quality_assessment" TEXT /* Textual assessment of the data quality */,
  "assessed_by" TEXT /* Name of the assessor */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was made */,
  "quality_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the quality assessment */,
  "quality_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sunspot_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sunspot_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being described */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., observer, instrument used) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who added the metadata */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the metadata was added */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., observational, computational) */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sunspot_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being related */,
  "related_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related data point */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relation (e.g., parent, child, related) */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who added the relation */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the relation was added */,
  "relation_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the relation (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  "relation_description" TEXT /* Description of the relation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_relations_related_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_data_id") REFERENCES sunspot_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_relations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sunspot_data ("data_id")
)
